disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Passed almost no urine since yesterday morning despite trying, over roughly 24-36 hours
trigger_question_examples: How much urine have you passed today?
When did you last pass a normal amount of urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Almost nothing since yesterday morning. I've tried but barely a few drops come out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New shortness of breath, worse when lying back
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing?
Is it harder to breathe when you lie down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm a bit puffed even resting, and it feels worse when I try to lie flat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New confusion and drowsiness reported by the spouse
trigger_question_examples: Has anyone noticed you being confused or drowsy?
Are you finding it hard to think clearly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My wife says I keep drifting off and getting my words muddled. I do feel foggy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent severe vomiting and diarrhoea with very poor fluid intake for several days
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to eat and drink normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a horrible tummy bug a few days ago, throwing up and diarrhoea, and I could barely keep any water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently taking frequent high-dose over-the-counter ibuprofen for back pain while also on a daily blood pressure tablet
trigger_question_examples: What medications and painkillers have you been taking?
Have you taken any anti-inflammatories like ibuprofen or Nurofen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking a fair bit of Nurofen for my back all week, and I take my usual blood pressure tablet every morning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Both legs swollen and puffy up to the calves
trigger_question_examples: Are your legs or ankles puffy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both legs are really swollen up to the calves, like heavy water balloons.

trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded, especially standing up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, whenever I try to stand I go really lightheaded and have to sit straight back down.

trigger_question_examples: Any nausea or change in appetite?
Have you been able to eat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel sick and I've completely gone off my food.
